author: Frontend Works CTO

Adapter unit + live-integration suite: 4/4 PASS against LIVE Railway v1.5.0 (bypasses browser CORS via Node fetch). Flow D regression: 5/5 PASS. Recommend separate Callback B to backend post-Loop-3. See fix-report.md §Loop 3 and self-test-report.md §13 for full evidence.
